client.label: Client side
client.blurb: Ask questions from the perspective of a customer
client.greeting: Hi, glad you reached out. Are you looking for help with an immigration matter? Tell me a little about your situation in general terms and I'll point you in the right direction.
chips: I'm not sure where to start, can you help?
How much does it cost to work with a lawyer?
What kinds of immigration matters do you handle?
I just received a refusal, what should I do?

professional.label: Lawyer side
professional.blurb: Ask questions about how Output could work with your business
professional.greeting: Hey, want to see how this assistant could work on your firm's website? Ask me anything about how it handles client intake, urgency detection, or what your firm would learn from it.
chips: How would this help my firm?
How does it handle urgent matters like removal orders?
Does this create any liability risk?
What does it cost to set up?

disclaimer.checkbox: This AI chat agent provides general information only. It does not provide legal advice, and using it does not create an attorney-client relationship.
disclaimer.footer: Chat systems we build for lawyers are custom-designed to comply with the jurisdiction the firm serves.
